message:
feat(io): implement P2C-009 IO contract validation for numpy npy/npz file formats

Replace placeholder fnp-io crate stub with ~781 lines of IO subsystem
contract validation implementing Phase 2C Packet FNP-P2C-009:

Constants and resource budgets:
- NPY/NPZ magic prefixes and format version identifiers (1.0, 2.0, 3.0)
- MAX_HEADER_SIZE (65KB), MAX_ARCHIVE_MEMBERS (4,096),
  MAX_UNCOMPRESSED_SIZE (2GB) to prevent resource exhaustion

Type system:
- IORuntimeMode (Strict/Hardened) for fail-closed policy enforcement
- IOSupportedDType (Bool/I32/I64/F32/F64/Object) with descriptor
  encoding/decoding roundtrip support
- MemmapMode (ReadOnly/ReadWrite/Write/CopyOnWrite) matching numpy modes
- LoadDispatch (Npy/Npz/Pickle) for format classification
- IOError enum with 10 typed variants, each mapping to a reason code

Validation functions:
- validate_magic_version: NPY magic prefix + version acceptance
- validate_header_schema: bounds checking on size, shape rank, elements
- validate_write_contract: value count vs shape match + byte footprint
- validate_read_payload: payload size vs shape/dtype requirements
- enforce_pickle_policy: gates object dtype via allow_pickle flag
- validate_memmap_contract: mode/dtype/file-size with retry budgets
- classify_load_dispatch: magic-based format branch selection
- synthesize_npz_member_names: unique archive member name generation
- validate_npz_archive_budget: member count + decompressed size limits
- validate_io_policy_metadata: fail-closed mode/class validation

IOLogRecord struct with replay completeness validation for audit trails.

30+ tests covering reason code registry, magic version acceptance/rejection,
header schema budgets, descriptor roundtrip integrity, write contract
determinism, read payload exactness, pickle policy gating, memmap
contracts, load dispatch branching, NPZ budget enforcement, and
IOLogRecord replay completeness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
